title: leonurus royleanus
intro: Leonurus royleanus, also known as Indian motherwort, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the mint family and characterized by its square stem and small, pinkish-purple flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and hypertension. The health benefits of Leonurus royleanus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Leonurus royleanus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, and the plant is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
